Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Game Testing Readiness
Content:
As of 2026-06-15, the WebSocketBridge.cs is fully implemented with a background receive loop (Channel<WorldEvent>), proper JSON serialization ({action, arguments} format), and multi-frame message reassembly. MineflayerAdapter/index.js is fully implemented with mineflayer-pathfinder for navigation, and handles move/mine/place/status/chat actions.

Pre-game testing checklist:
- [ ] Run 'npm install' in MineflayerAdapter/ to get mineflayer-pathfinder (new dependency).
- [ ] Start a Minecraft server (vanilla or Paper, version 1.16.4+ required for pathfinder).
- [ ] Set Agent:Enabled=true in WebUI.Blazor/appsettings.json.
- [ ] Set Agent:Minecraft:ServerHost, ServerPort, BotUsername, AutoStartNode:true, NodeScriptPath:../MineflayerAdapter/index.js.
- [ ] dotnet run --project WebUI.Blazor
- [ ] Watch logs for 'Mineflayer adapter starting' then 'Bot spawned' then 'World adapter connected'.
- [ ] POST /api/agent/plan with {goalName:GatherWood, parameters:{count:5}} and watch bot in game.

If the bot connects but doesn't pathfind: confirm mineflayer-pathfinder is installed and the server is 1.16.4+.
